heading: Application of other laws
label: 2105 Application of other laws
text: The provisions of this chapter are in addition to, and not in substitution for or limitation of, the provisions of any other law of the United States or of the law of any State.
notes: Effective DateSection applicable only to imitation political items and imitation numismatic items manufactured after , see , set out as a note under .Nov. 29, 1973section 8 of Pub. L. 93–167section 2101 of this title
